title: Rachel Zegler Kills Snow White With HATE Rant! Film is DOA Now.
description:
Rachel Zegler Kills Snow White With HATE Rant! Film is DOA Now. Rachel Zegler’s recent social media meltdown is sending shockwaves through Disney's upcoming Snow White live-action film. Her comments are stirring up backlash, and many fans are questioning Disney's silence. Is this a repeat of the Gina Carano controversy? In this video, we dive into Zegler’s latest comments, fan reactions, and what it could mean for Disney's reputation and Snow White's box office potential. Will Disney finally see that they’re hiring the wrong people? Stay tuned for the full breakdown!
